items.summary: We have our cover athletes for NBA 2K27, and once again the three-tier system of NBA star, WNBA star, and recent Hall of Fame inductee is reigning supreme. 2K Sports gave SB Nation an early look at the covers, before releasing them to the world on Wednesday and here’s a full look at both the different designs, as well as what the different versions of the game entail. items.title: Pacers star Tyrese Haliburton marries longtime partner Jade Jones
items.summary: Indiana Pacers star Tyrese Haliburton shared on social media that he has officially tied the knot with his longtime partner, Jade Jones, earlier this week.The couple announced on Instagram that they are now "courthouse official," having exchanged vows at an Indianapolis courthouse surrounded by close friends and family. The couple has shared plans to celebrate with a larger wedding ceremony on Aug. 1..oembed-frame {width:100%;height:100%;margin:0;border:0;}View this post on InstagramA post shared by Jade (@jadeeejones)The couple’s love story started in college in 2019, with Haliburton on the Iowa State basketball team and Jones on the Iowa State cheerleading team. After seven years together, Haliburton proposed on July 28, 2025, at the Hilton Coliseum.Haliburton missed the entire 2025-26 NBA season after suffering a torn Achilles during Game 7 of the 2025 NBA Finals. He has spent the…

items.title: Victor Wembanyama to reportedly be named NBA 2K27 cover athlete
items.summary: San Antonio Spurs superstar Victor Wembanyama will reportedly be revealed as the cover athlete for the upcoming NBA 2K27 video game, per ESPN's Shams Charania.Wembanyama is the first center to be on the cover of a 2K basketball game since Shaquille O'Neal was on the cover of the Legend Edition of 2K18. Not only is it Wembanyama's first video game cover of his career, but he is also the first Spurs player to appear on the cover since the game's release in 1999.Wembanyama has been in the NBA for three years, winning the Rookie of the Year award in 2024 and the NBA's Defensive Player of the Year award in 2026. The 7-foot-4 center has taken the league by storm and, through 181 games, is averaging 23.4 points, 11 rebounds, 3.5 assists, and 3.5 blocks per game. Wembanyama dropped 50 points against the Washington Wizards in November 2024 and has eight other regular season…

items.title: Latest LeBron James free agency news, rumors, updates on 'Decision'
items.summary: It's been 23 days and counting. And the NBA is still for LeBron James to make his decision.His agent, Klutch Sports CEO Rich Paul, has put out messages to teams suggesting they not wait for James and that they should fill their remaining roster spots.Those messages came after NBA Commissioner Adam Silver expressed his desire for James to decide so schedule makers can determine the 2026-27 regular season, including important dates such as opening night and Christmas Day.The idea is that James would be playing on those days, hence Silver's desire to know which team he'll choose. But James won't be rushed, according to Paul.It likely comes down to the Cleveland Cavaliers, Miami Heat and Philadelphia 76ers as the top three candidates to land James. However, the Golden State Warriors are not to be counted out yet.The Minnesota Timberwolves and Denver Nuggets also have been in the…

items.title: Swanson: LeBron James is taking his time team-hunting, but why are the Warriors an option?
items.summary: LeBron James, left, and Stephen Curry after a game at Chase Center in April. James is currently considering joining Curry and the Warriors next season. (Ezra Shaw / Getty Images)Take all the time you want, LeBron. It’s your life.Yes, it’s annoying to have to hear about it every day, but it’s your decision when to tell us where you’re going to play your 24th season of pro ball.So, go ahead, keep NBA schedule-makers on pins and needles. Savor having workers at my local Trader Joe’s discussing your future on a Monday in the middle of July. Enjoy your twilight limelight.But don’t tell us, on podcasts and in public appearances, that the factors you’re prioritizing are A) whether a team is built to win now; B) the proximity to your home in L.A.; and C) not money, but overall happiness — and then signal it might be the Golden State Warriors.The Cleveland Cavaliers? They check all the…

items.title: Mark Pope provides a practice report recapping the Las Vegas trip
items.summary: Dec 28, 2025; Paradise, Nevada, USA; The Welcome to Fabulous Las Vegas sign on the Las Vegas strip. Mandatory Credit: Kirby Lee-Imagn Images | Kirby Lee-Imagn Images Mark Pope recently did an interview with UK Sports Network and was asked numerous questions about the team’s trip to Las Vegas earlier this month. Pope provided some clarity on why the team went, what they did, and what came from the trip.When asked what went into the decision, Pope responded, “Well, during that week, Vegas is kind of the basketball capital of the world, and it’s a perfect fusion of Kentucky Basketball, and all the guys that we’re recruiting, and all the guys that have played here that are now playing in the NBA. “So, you bring the high school and the college and the NBA ranks together, it was perfect for us.”With the blend of that, Kentucky men’s basketball social media pages shared pictures showing the…

items.title: Is there a case for Bradley Beal in Boston?
items.summary: Is there a case for Bradley Beal in Boston? originally appeared on NBC Sports BostonWe spent a whole bunch of time — maybe too much time — in the early 2020s pondering if the Boston Celtics might eventually make a run at acquiring Bradley Beal. And just when you thought that ship had long sailed, here we are again.The Celtics and Heat are two potential landing spots for the now 33-year-old Beal, according to a report Tuesday from Bleacher Report. Beal is a three-time All-Star who hasn’t played more than 53 games in a season since his 2021 All-NBA nod with Washington.At first blush, it’s easy to dismiss the possibility. While the Celtics do have an open roster spot, the team sits just below the luxury tax threshold and already added a veteran guard this offseason by signing 38-year-old Mike Conley. Beal appeared in just six games last season for the Clippers and hasn’t positively…
